summary: Tested 3 features: 1) Diamond making charge calculation on gross weight - PASS, 2) Gold making charge calculation on net weight - PASS, 3) Home button visibility across all pages - PASS. All backend tests passed (6/6). All frontend tests passed.

issues: Recharts dimension warnings on page load (non-critical, existing issue)

passed_tests: Diamond item making charge calculated on GROSS weight (per_gram: 500/g * 10g gross = 5000)
Gold item making charge calculated on NET weight (per_gram: 500/g * 9.5g net = 4750)
Diamond percentage making uses GROSS weight (10% * 24KT rate * gross)
Gold percentage making uses NET weight (10% * 24KT rate * net)
Diamond with L-type studded deduction still uses GROSS weight for making
Calculate item endpoint accessible with authentication
Home button NOT visible on Admin Dashboard (/admin)
Desktop Home button visible on Reports page (data-testid='desktop-home-button')
Home button navigates to /admin dashboard when clicked
Mobile Home button visible on Reports page (data-testid='mobile-home-button')

admin.method: Click 'Admin Login' link, fill credentials, click 'Sign In as Admin'

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 features verified working: 1) Diamond making charges use gross_weight (calc_engine.py line 275), 2) Gold making charges use net_weight (calc_engine.py line 184), 3) Home button visible on all non-dashboard pages via AppLayout.js (desktop-home-button, mobile-home-button) and standalone pages (BillPage: bill-home-button, ItemCalculator: home-button, MrpCalculator: mrp-home-btn, BillPrintView: home-from-print, CustomerProfilePage: home-btn). OTP delivery is MOCKED.

diamond_making_on_gross_weight.formula: per_gram making: 500/g * 10g gross = 5000 (NOT 4750 on net weight)

mocked_apis.OTP_delivery: OTP codes visible via GET /api/admin/pending-otps instead of actual SMS delivery
